_comment: Scope-aware rename output eval (US-426). Each case runs renameAt(cursorUri, offset-of(find,occurrence), newName, files); applies the resulting WorkspaceEdit; and asserts each file's resulting text equals `expect[uri]`, OR that the rename is rejected (`expectRejectMatches`). RED until server/src/providers/rename.ts ships.

cases.name: temporary rename touches only its own method

files.file:///t.st:
Object subclass: Foo [
  bar [ | acc | acc := 1. ^acc ]
  baz [ | acc | ^acc ] ]

expect.file:///t.st:
Object subclass: Foo [
  bar [ | total | total := 1. ^total ]
  baz [ | acc | ^acc ] ]

files.file:///a.st:
Object subclass: Foo [
  add: x [ ^x + x ] ]

expect.file:///a.st:
Object subclass: Foo [
  add: n [ ^n + n ] ]

cases.name: instance variable rename spans the defining and the extending file

files.file:///account.st:
Object subclass: Account [
  | balance |
  deposit: n [ balance := balance + n ] ]

expect.file:///account.st:
Object subclass: Account [
  | funds |
  deposit: n [ funds := funds + n ] ]

cases.name: instance variable rename skips a method that shadows the name locally

files.file:///account.st:
Object subclass: Account [
  | balance |
  deposit: n [ balance := n ] ]

expect.file:///account.st:
Object subclass: Account [
  | funds |
  deposit: n [ funds := n ] ]

files.file:///c.st:
Object subclass: Foo [
  bar [ | acc total | acc := total ] ]
